Home / Services / Ceiling Fan Installation

Ceiling Fan Installation

Professional ceiling fan installation for comfort and energy savings.

Ceiling fans can improve air circulation, reduce energy costs, and enhance the comfort of your home. Nealco Electrical Services offers professional ceiling fan installation services for homes throughout the Austin area. Whether you're installing a new ceiling fan or replacing an existing one, our licensed electricians can ensure a safe and reliable installation.

We handle all aspects of ceiling fan installation, including wiring, mounting, and balancing. We also offer ceiling fan repair services to address issues such as wobbling, noise, and motor problems. Our electricians are experienced in installing a variety of ceiling fan styles and sizes, including fans with lights, remote controls, and energy-efficient features.

Enhance the comfort and energy efficiency of your Austin home with professional ceiling fan installation from Nealco Electrical Services. We can handle the job safely and efficiently, ensuring your ceiling fan operates smoothly and reliably.

Our Process

  1. 01 Site Assessment and Fan Selection
  2. 02 Safe Wiring and Mounting
  3. 03 Blade Balancing and Testing
  4. 04 Remote Control Configuration (if applicable)

Benefits

  • Improved Air Circulation
  • Reduced Energy Costs
  • Enhanced Comfort
  • Stylish Design

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you install a ceiling fan on a sloped ceiling?

Yes, we can install ceiling fans on sloped ceilings using special adapters and mounting hardware.

How long does it take to install a ceiling fan?

The duration of a ceiling fan installation typically ranges from 1 to 2 hours, depending on the complexity of the job.

Do I need a permit for ceiling fan installation?

In most cases, a permit is not required for ceiling fan installation unless new wiring is being installed. We can advise you on local permit requirements.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with ceiling fan installation? Contact us today.
